verdict: PASS WITH ONE MUST-FIX-BEFORE-CONSOLIDATE. The merge is structurally sound, fully reconciled, and the gate enforced every safety rule on the new volume. One defect: 4 self-flagged 'candidate'/possibly-closed rows sit in ready_to_validate and should be demoted to needs_more_evidence before any consolidate step (the schema-only validator will not catch them). Everything else is clean. Freeze remains in force; --allow-db-write NOT authorized.

Coverage is partial; the headline % must be computed FROM the full census ledger with coverage at consolidate time, never from ready alone and never anchored to ADA/5%-floor.

1_new_ready_rows_documentary_backed.evidence: true_independent (30): basis web_verified 11 / intel_dossier 19; 0 rows with no URL AND no artifact => 0 silent-defaults (all owner-operated single-location verifications). name_chain-basis (82): 100% carry a documentary URL (0 with no URL); 39 of them are DSO-tier and 0 are weak. DSO-tier (85): 0 rows lacking both a URL and a strong structural artifact. The +87 growth is fully traceable to reach4 (43) + Lane1B (44) released rows, each with gate=ready_for_validation provenance.

2_no_ao_reach_only_in_ready.evidence: 0 ready rows with empty evidence_urls AND no strong artifact. The 3 ao_cluster-BASIS rows (Kim family 2 locs, Anna Pelak sole-prop 2 locs, Sunita Sahu 3 locs) each carry 1-2 web URLs + intel dossier + BBB — multi-source, not ao-reach-only; the basis LABEL understates the real evidence. Proof the gate works: Lane1B 'Kalpana Shah' was routed to BACKFILL with note 'ao_cluster AO-reach-only, no website/BBB/intel corroborator' — i.e. a true ao-reach-only row was correctly kept OUT of ready.

4_dentist_family_separated_from_MSO_DSO_.evidence: reach4 verdicts are exemplary and honor the taxonomy correction: HUERTA_BELINDA verdict=pe_mso_backed -> branded_dso pe=true; GROH_LAWRENCE verdict=dso_brand -> branded_dso pe=FALSE and correctly NOT downgraded to dentist_multi (established brand). dentist_multi rows carry explicit 'No MSO/PE/management company' findings (Takla/Pal/Nourahmadi). The needs_more_evidence bucket actively HOLDS DSO-tier candidates that rest only on a locator/own-site ('DSO tier rests on a locator/own-site with no MSO/PE/established-brand evidence — canonical rule: locator != MSO'). Separation between dentist/family consolidators (T2/T3) and MSO/DSO/PE (T4/T5) is intact.

DEFECT_closed_or_unverified_doors_in_rea.problem: All 4 carry the gate owner's OWN 'gate_status=candidate' / 'unverified' / 'may be closed' markers — distinct from the legitimate reach4 rows that carry 'gate=ready_for_validation'. Yet all 4 sit in ready_to_validate (each occurs exactly once in the manifest; none is cross-listed in denominator_caveat). ready_to_validate feeds consolidate_census.py --validate-only, which is a SCHEMA/DB gate and does NOT re-judge operating status or address existence (standing rule). So a closed/billing-only/unverified door could be consolidated into the active GP denominator. Their dentist_multi STRUCTURE is defensible (Valley View / Khurana and Palella/Modern Dental are real dentist-owned groups — keep as network intelligence); only the door-level inclusion in the active denominator is wrong.
DEFECT_closed_or_unverified_doors_in_rea.fix: Demote these 4 from ready_to_validate to needs_more_evidence with missing_evidence_type='operating_status_or_address_unverified' (Khurana x3) and 'operating_status_closed_per_yelp' (Palella x1). Preserve the network intelligence. Net effect: ready 210 -> 206; consolidated/dso tallies adjust by -4 dentist_multi. Denominator impact is ~0.09% (4/4364), so NON-BLOCKING to merge quality but MUST be done before --allow-db-write since the validator will not catch it.
DEFECT_closed_or_unverified_doors_in_rea.also_correct_6_of_8: The other 6 'CLOSED'-language ready rows are CORRECT: the closed reference is to a sibling/legacy location in the shared network artifact list, while the row's own door is active (4 Takla/Pal flagship doors). The Krizek true_independent row even explicitly EXCLUDES the closed Kevin Fee legacy NPI at the same EIN — good handling.

6_conflicts_and_nme_preserved_honestly.evidence: Conflicts (74): every row carries `reason` + per-pass `sources` map showing the actual disagreement, e.g. '1st Family Dental is CONTESTED across signed passes (DSO vs dentist_multi)' with sources {ownership_QA: branded_dso, ao_QA: dentist_multi, addendum: branded_dso}. PROTECTED network BELKIC_VESNA (1st Family Dental of Logan Square) is held HERE as contested, NOT released — correct double-gating. needs_more_evidence (158): every row carries `reason` + `missing_evidence_type` + `final_tier`/`why_demoted`; the locator!=MSO rule is actively holding DSO-tier candidates out ('DSO tier rests on a locator/own-site with no MSO/PE/established-brand evidence'). [Self-correction: an earlier field-name probe (`reasoning`) wrongly suggested these were blank; the detail lives under `reason`+`sources`. Both buckets are richly, honestly preserved.]
